prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model. We used the current price of $219.86, a time horizon of 18 days (approximately 0.0714 years, assuming 252 trading days per year), an assumed annual drift (mu) of 8%, and an assumed annual volatility (sigma) of 25%. The point estimate represents the median of the predicted log-normal price distribution, and the confidence intervals are derived from the standard deviation of the log-returns.
